## Overview
This visa category is for workers who are employed by shipping or leisure maritime companies.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Short stay: Transit and Maritime Transport]
Service Fees VFS Global

[Table:  Short stay: Transit and Maritime Transport]
Value Added Services (VAS)

[Table:  Short stay: Transit and Maritime Transport]
*Includes pre-appointment booking journey, document verification, guidance on booking an appointment, photocopies in case of missing documents, assistance in filling out the form.
**Includes priority submission, personal assistance for passport upload, document pre-check, guidance on booking an appointment, hold at location or VAC to VAC service.
Please note:
- The visa fee is collected on behalf of the Embassy of Italy in Rabat.
- The applicable fees in Moroccan dirhams are based on the current exchange rate updated every three months.
- Visa fees and service fees are not refundable.
- VAS are optional services and will not reduce the processing time or influence the visa request outcome.
- All the VFS service fees and VAS include a 20% tax on products and services.

## Documents Required
Click here to download the list of required documents for Transit and Maritime Transport visa type.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size ((3.5 cm x 4.0 cm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below specs to be maintained at 3.5 cm x 4.0 cm
Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in color:
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - (3.5 cm x 4.0 cm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for a Schengen visa, regulated by the Visa Code, is 15 days, which can be extended up to 45 days in certain cases.
The processing time for a national visa, regulated by Italian law, is 90 days (30 days for family reasons and subordinate employment - 120 days for independent employment).

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Individuals travelling to Italy with the purpose of Family Reunion with EU citizen.
It is specified that, to demonstrate the stable residence in Italy of the Italian/EU citizen, the Italian/EU citizen must present a certificate of residence or, alternatively, a self-declaration issued by the Municipality where they reside. The self-declaration is issued free of charge and must be accompanied by a copy of a valid identity document.
Furthermore, regarding the consent document for minors, it is specified that this document must explicitly state that consent for reunification is given permanently. In the minor's visa application form, it must be explicitly indicated that it is a reunification for 365 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Individuals travelling to Italy with the purpose of Family Reunion with EU citizen.
It is specified that, to demonstrate the stable residence in Italy of the Italian/EU citizen, the Italian/EU citizen must present a certificate of residence or, alternatively, a self-declaration issued by the Municipality where they reside. The self-declaration is issued free of charge and must be accompanied by a copy of a valid identity document.
Furthermore, regarding the consent document for minors, it is specified that this document must explicitly state that consent for reunification is given permanently. In the minor's visa application form, it must be explicitly indicated that it is a reunification for 365 days.

## Visa Fees

*Includes pre-appointment booking journey, document verification, guidance on booking an appointment, photocopies in case of missing documents, assistance in filling out the form.
**Includes priority submission, personal assistance for passport upload, document pre-check, guidance on booking an appointment, hold at location or VAC to VAC service.
Please note:
- The visa fee is collected on behalf of the Embassy of Italy in Rabat.
- The applicable fees in Moroccan dirhams are based on the current exchange rate updated every three months.
- Visa fees and service fees are not refundable.
- VAS are optional services and will not reduce the processing time or influence the visa request outcome.
- All the VFS service fees and VAS include a 20% tax on products and services.

## Documents Required
Click here to download the list of required documents for family reunion with EU citizen.

## Photo Specifications
Two recent full face color photos, passport size ((3.5 cm x 4.0 cm), taken against a light background
Sample Photograph: Below specs to be maintained at 3.5 cm x 4.0 cm

Please provide your recent photograph (not more than 6 months old). The photographs should be in color:
- Taken against a clear white background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background;
- Clear and of good quality(as per the ticked sample but with white background);
- Printed on normal photographic paper;
- Unmounted - (3.5 cm x 4.0 cm in size;
- Full face (without sunglasses and normally without a hat or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background).

## Processing Time
The processing time for a Schengen visa, regulated by the Visa Code, is 15 days, which can be extended up to 45 days in certain cases.
The processing time for a national visa, regulated by Italian law, is 90 days (30 days for family reasons and subordinate employment - 120 days for independent employment).
